text.title: Research Repository Operations Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Week 21 ops cycle
example.note: Ingested 612 sessions; tagged 598 (14 in ambiguity queue); deduped 14 records via hash; archived 12 studies >24mo; removed 1 access grant for off-boarded user; health report published.
